name: area-mockups-monorepo
description: Monorepo for area-mockups — interactive, GPU-accelerated 3D device mockups for React.

scripts.build: npm run build -w area-mockups && npm run build -w docs
scripts.dev: concurrently -n pkg,docs -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w area-mockups" "npm run dev -w docs"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w area-mockups && npm run typecheck -w docs
